category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Libnet as an API for construction and injection of network packets.
source_facts.description: C library for creating IP packets
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage and build documentation.
Official README links to online docs at https://codedocs.xyz/libnet/libnet/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/libnet/libnet; per instruction repo is returned as null when source_facts.repo is present.
tags_sources: Official README describes low-level network packet writing, IP-layer and link-layer packet creation.
source_facts.description identifies a C library for creating IP packets.
